jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at AstraZeneca India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? AstraZeneca India in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About AstraZeneca India:
AstraZeneca India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India!
